zh.Preston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素可普雷斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Julian於1375年出生在英國素可普雷斯頓。他於1399年與Lady Ann Palmer of Angmering在英國英格蘭素可安莫林結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年在英國英格蘭素可普雷斯頓享年60歲。

zh-hans.Preston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰素可普雷斯頓

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German; Spanish (Julián): from a personal name, Latin Iulianus, a derivative of Iulius (see Julius ), which was borne by a number of early Christian saints. Compare English Gillian .
French (southern): from a variant of the personal name   Julien   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The surname Julian of French origin (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form(s) (St.) Julien in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Julia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan Carlos, Luis, Miguel, Aida, Altagracia, Ana, Carlos, Conchita, Garcia, Gregorio, Gustavo, Jaime.
Catalan (Julià): from the personal name Julià,Catalan form of Julian .

variants.name: Jolles
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Julle, itself a short form of Julian or the female name Juliane, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Jew 4.
Dutch: patronymic from the Frisian personal name Jolle, a vowel variant of Jelle, a vernacular short form of an ancient Germanic name composed with the element gelt ‘sacrifice, repay’.

variants.name: Giuliano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Vito, Antonio, Sal, Carlo, Pasquale, Angelo, Concetto, Domenic, Domenico, Filippo, Gaetano.
Italian:
from the personal name Giuliano, an equivalent of Julian .

variants.name: Illian
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Friedhelm, Klaus, Otto.
German: possibly from a short form of Julianus, the Latin form of the personal name Julian .

variants.name: Jewson
meanings: English (Norfolk): patronymic from any of the Middle English personal names Jew(e), Julle, or Jouet, all pet forms of Julian (mainly a female name) + -son; see Jew , Jowett .

variants.name: Julien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Jacques, Michel, Antoine, Lucien, Marcel, Adelard, Ancil, Anite, Armand, Aubert.
French: from the personal name Julien, French form of Julian . In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of French Saint-Julien (see St. Julien ).
English: variant of   Julian  .

variants.name: Julius
meanings: German, Dutch, and African (mainly Tanzania, also e.g. South Africa): from the Latin personal name Julius, originally an aristocratic Roman surname made famous by Julius Caesar, the first Roman emperor. The personal name was borne in the Middle Ages by various minor Christian saints, and was nearly as popular as its derivative Julianus (see Julian ).

variants.name: Juliao
meanings: Portuguese (Julião): from the personal name Julião (see Julian ).

variants.name: Juliano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Salvatore, Amato, Carmela, Domenic, Pasquale, Amelio, Carmine, Domenica, Domenico.
Catalan and southern Italian: from the personal name Juliano (see Julian ). As an Italian name, it is a variant of Giuliano .

variants.name: Gillian
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French male and female personal names Gillian, Gilion, Jilian, Gelian, all vernacular forms of Latin Julianus and Juliana (see Julian ).
Irish (Antrim): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gileáin ‘son of Gileán’, a variant of the personal name Gealán, from a diminutive of geal ‘bright, white’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Julian was born in 1375, in Preston, Sussex, England. He married Lady Ann Palmer of Angmering in 1399, in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1435, in Preston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Julian est né en 1375, à Preston, Sussex, Angleterre. Il a épousé Lady Ann Palmer of Angmering en 1399, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1435, à Preston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Julian wurde 1375 in Preston, Sussex, England geboren. Er hat 1399 in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Lady Ann Palmer of Angmering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Preston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Julian è nato il nel 1375 nel Preston, Sussex, England. Lui sposato Lady Ann Palmer of Angmering nel 1399, nel Angmering, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1435, nel Preston, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Robert Julian(은)는 1375년 영국 수세스 프레스턴에서 태어났다. 그는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 앤그머잉에서 Lady Ann Palmer of Angmering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 프레스턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он умер в 1435 г. в местности престон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.
